show me the makefile targets
❯ show me the makefile targets
⠋ Thinking...⠙ Thinking...
Here are the Makefile targets:

```makefile
# Build targets
build: build-gateway build-admin
build-gateway:
	go build -o bin/coven-gateway ./cmd/coven-gateway
build-admin:
	go build -o bin/coven-admin ./cmd/coven-admin

# Test targets
test:
	go test -v ./...

# ─── Frontend ───────────────────────────────
# These targets handle web asset compilation
web: web-tokens
	cd web && npm run build
web-dev:
	cd web && npm run dev
```

The `# ─── Frontend ───` comment line contains Unicode dashes similar to the horizontal rule, but it's inside a code block so it's part of the response content, not a boundary marker.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

❯
